verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus Asaph.   Deus stetit in synagoga deorum ;  in medio autem deos dijudicat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִזְמ֗וֹר לְאָ֫סָ֥ף אֱֽלֹהִ֗ים נִצָּ֥ב בַּעֲדַת־אֵ֑ל בְּקֶ֖רֶב אֱלֹהִ֣ים יִשְׁפֹּֽט׃
verses.king_james: God standeth in the congregation of the mighty; he judgeth among the gods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Usquequo judicatis iniquitatem,  et facies peccatorum sumitis ?
verses.king_james: How long will ye judge unjustly, and accept the persons of the wicked? Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Judicate egeno et pupillo ;  humilem et pauperem justificate.
verses.king_james: Defend the poor and fatherless: do justice to the afflicted and needy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eripite pauperem,  et egenum de manu peccatoris liberate.
verses.king_james: Deliver the poor and needy: rid them out of the hand of the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nescierunt, neque intellexerunt ;  in tenebris ambulant :  movebuntur omnia fundamenta terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֤א יָדְע֨וּ ׀ וְלֹ֥א יָבִ֗ינוּ בַּחֲשֵׁכָ֥ה יִתְהַלָּ֑כוּ יִ֝מּ֗וֹטוּ כׇּל־מ֥וֹסְדֵי אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: They know not, neither will they understand; they walk on in darkness: all the foundations of the earth are out of course.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego dixi : Dii estis,  et filii Excelsi omnes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲֽנִי־אָ֭מַרְתִּי אֱלֹהִ֣ים אַתֶּ֑ם וּבְנֵ֖י עֶלְי֣וֹן כֻּלְּכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: I have said, Ye are gods; and all of you are children of the most High.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vos autem sicut homines moriemini,  et sicut unus de principibus cadetis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֭כֵן כְּאָדָ֣ם תְּמוּת֑וּן וּכְאַחַ֖ד הַשָּׂרִ֣ים תִּפֹּֽלוּ׃
verses.king_james: But ye shall die like men, and fall like one of the princes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surge, Deus, judica terram,  quoniam tu hæreditabis in omnibus gentibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קוּמָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים שׇׁפְטָ֣ה הָאָ֑רֶץ כִּֽי־אַתָּ֥ה תִ֝נְחַ֗ל בְּכׇל־הַגּוֹיִֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Arise, O God, judge the earth: for thou shalt inherit all nations.
